Apportionment
Off Calendar Mar-25-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day. Present: Commissioner; Sue Kaplan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Sara Lerschen. Plaintiff Kimberly Heeter, the surviving spouse, was represented by Stephen M. Fishback, Esq., and was sworn and examined. No appearance by Carol Billiter, the daughter. The court having received evidence and reviewed the statement by Carol Billiter, orders distribution of net settlement of funds as follows: Kimberly Hector - 65%; Carol Billiter - 35% for a total of $100%. Attorney fees and costs in the amount of $605.82. Order signed in open court.
